auth.otpSent: A verification code has been sent to your phone
auth.agreeToTerms: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your communities
auth.signupSubtitle: Join your village, alumni, or community group
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one platform for njangis, alumni unions, village associations, and church groups. Manage members, track contributions, and stay connected — from anywhere in the world.
landing.trustedBy: Trusted by community leaders across the diaspora
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built by Africans, for African community groups. We understand how njangis, tontines, and associations actually work.
landing.featureMembershipDesc: Track members, roles, and standing. Proxy management for elders. One account, unlimited groups.
landing.featureContributionsDesc: Record dues, donations, and njangi rotations. Auto-reminders for outstanding balances. Full transparency.
landing.featureMeetingsDesc: Schedule meetings, record attendance, capture decisions and action items. Searchable history.
landing.featureCommsDesc: Announcements, notifications, and group messaging. Reach members via app, email, or SMS.
landing.featureFinanceDesc: Real-time dashboards, treasurer reports, and audit trails. See exactly where every franc goes.
landing.featureBilingualDesc: Full English and French support. Each member chooses their language. Perfect for Cameroon and beyond.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your group grows.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of groups already using VillageClaq to stay connected and accountable.
landing.footerTagline: Bringing African communities together, one group at a time.

mock.paymentReminderBody: Your monthly contribution of 10,000 FCFA for March 2026 is due by March 25. Please make your payment to avoid penalties.
mock.eventRsvpBody: The monthly general meeting is scheduled for Saturday, March 28 at 3:00 PM at the Community Hall. Please confirm your attendance.
mock.minutesPublishedBody: The minutes from the February 2026 general meeting have been published. Review the key decisions and action items.
mock.reliefApprovedBody: Your bereavement relief claim has been approved. The amount of 50,000 FCFA will be disbursed within 48 hours.
mock.newMemberBody: Marie Nguemo has joined the group as a regular member. Welcome her to the community!
mock.announcementBody: Dear members, I am pleased to announce that our annual end-of-year gala will be held on December 20, 2026. More details to follow.
mock.eventWeekBody: A youth empowerment workshop is planned for next Saturday. Open to all members and their families.
mock.paymentConfirmBody: Your contribution of 10,000 FCFA for February 2026 has been received and recorded. Thank you!
mock.minutesWeekBody: You have 2 new action items from the last meeting. Please review and complete them before the next meeting.
mock.reliefEarlierBody: The group relief fund balance is now 500,000 FCFA. New enrollment period opens April 1.
